queries.name: t1090_c2_sockets
queries.description: Suspicious outbound connections for Proxy (T1090)
queries.sql: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.path, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port, s.state FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address != '127.0.0.1' AND s.remote_address != '::1' AND s.state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1528_shadow_read
queries.description: Access to credential files for Steal Application Access Token (T1528)
queries.sql: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE (target_path LIKE '%shadow%' OR target_path LIKE '%passwd%' OR target_path LIKE '%.ssh/%' OR target_path LIKE '%credential%') LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1528_proc_cred
queries.description: Processes accessing credential stores for Steal Application Access Token (T1528)
queries.sql: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%shadow%' OR cmdline LIKE '%passwd%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mimikatz%' OR cmdline LIKE '%credential%' OR cmdline LIKE '%hashdump%' LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1529_proc_impact
queries.description: Destructive process activity for System Shutdown/Reboot (T1529)
queries.sql: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%rm -rf%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mkfs%' OR cmdline LIKE '%dd if=%' OR cmdline LIKE '%shred%' OR cmdline LIKE '%wipe%' LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1529_disk_events
queries.description: File deletion events for System Shutdown/Reboot (T1529)
queries.sql: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action = 'DELETE' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1530_file_access
queries.description: File access patterns for Data from Cloud Storage (T1530)
queries.sql: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action IN ('OPEN', 'READ') AND target_path NOT LIKE '/proc/%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1531_proc_impact
queries.description: Destructive process activity for Account Access Removal (T1531)
queries.sql: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%rm -rf%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mkfs%' OR cmdline LIKE '%dd if=%' OR cmdline LIKE '%shred%' OR cmdline LIKE '%wipe%' LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1531_disk_events
queries.description: File deletion events for Account Access Removal (T1531)
queries.sql: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action = 'DELETE' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1534_ssh_keys
queries.description: SSH key access for Internal Spearphishing (T1534)
queries.sql: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;

queries.name: t1534_net_conn
queries.description: Outbound connections for Internal Spearphishing (T1534)
queries.sql: SELECT pid, local_address, local_port, remote_address, remote_port, state FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port IN (22, 135, 139, 445, 3389, 5985, 5986) AND state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1535_proc_hidden
queries.description: Suspicious process attributes for Unused/Unsupported Cloud Regions (T1535)
queries.sql: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1535_file_mod
queries.description: Recently modified files in suspicious locations for Unused/Unsupported Cloud Regions (T1535)
queries.sql: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

queries.name: t1537_exfil_net
queries.description: Outbound data transfer for Transfer Data to Cloud Account (T1537)
queries.sql: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '127.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '10.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '192.168.%' LIMIT 100;
